title: React Property Marketplace Assessment
description: A property marketplace application where candidates need to fix issues with numeric price sorting, rating sorting, case-sensitive/exact-match search, and favorites list persistence. There is also a bonus task to implement a minimum rating filter.

tasks.title: Fix Broken Price Sorting
tasks.description: Price sorting is currently alphabetically comparing price strings (e.g. '$1,200' sorts before '$950'). Modify the sorting logic to extract numeric values and sort properties correctly by their numeric price.

tasks.title: Add Rating Sorting
tasks.description: The dropdown sort option 'Sort by Rating' currently does nothing. Implement rating sorting to sort properties in descending order (highest rated first) when selected.

tasks.title: Fix Search Functionality
tasks.description: Search is currently case-sensitive and does not match locations or support partial matches. Implement a case-insensitive search that matches both property title and location, and supports partial string matches.

tasks.title: Fix Favorites Persistence
tasks.description: Favorites currently disappear upon page reload. Update the application to persist the favorited property IDs using localStorage.

tasks.title: Add Minimum Rating Filter
tasks.description: Add a minimum rating filter dropdown/select component to allow filtering properties. Options should include: 1+, 2+, 3+, 4+, and 5+. Only show properties with ratings greater than or equal to the selected value.
